content: Meridian Freight Holdings Inc. is a synthetic, illustrative transportation issuer positioned exactly on the investment-grade / high-yield boundary. One anchor provider places it at the lowest investment-grade notch (BBB-) while the other places it one notch lower, in high yield (BB+). The gap is a single notch, but it straddles the IG/HY line, so that one notch changes the issuer's eligibility bucket. Meridian is the anchor case for the fallen-angel boundary, where notch precision matters most.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative issuer — fictional entity, not a real SEC filer.
